## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] Manual validation completed for impacted flows
- [ ] Screenshots or logs attached when useful

## Runtime Config Safety

- [ ] Provider/model behavior is consistent between UI and backend
- [ ] `.env` defaults and runtime overrides still merge correctly

## UX Checklist

- [ ] Loading, success, and error states are clear
- [ ] Labels and button actions are explicit
- [ ] No ambiguous copy remains for critical actions
